name: @wsmy/antora-markdown-exporter
description: Antora Assembler based Markdown exporter with semantic IR, inspection surfaces, and explicit Markdown flavor rendering

scripts.build: tsup --dts --format esm,cjs --out-dir dist src/index.ts src/runtime.ts src/extension/index.ts
scripts.lint: biome check bin src tests scripts package.json biome.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.fix: biome check --write bin src tests scripts package.json biome.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.format: biome format --write bin src tests scripts package.json biome.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts
scripts.check: biome check bin src tests scripts package.json biome.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json vitest.config.ts && vitest run --coverage
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run check && npm run release:check
